official_functions.role: Create the real initialized source and destination Entity fixture
Construct the official Play clientbound set_entity_link fixture
Write and dispatch the full Play clientbound framed packet

invariants: The official Play clientbound protocol codec writes packet id 0x64 before the set_entity_link body.
The fixture preserves source entity id 1 and destination entity id 2 and consumes the body.
This contract does not prove arbitrary entity ids, leash semantics, world state, or client-load behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this packet-support contract to infer arbitrary entity relationships or gameplay semantics.
